untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Rate of Change (ROC) indicator which is not in the allowed indicator list. The rule specifically requires tracking ROC_6, ROC_12, and ROC_24 periods simultaneously peaking and then all declining together. Without direct ROC support, this precise multi-period synchronization condition cannot be accurately translated. Alternative proxies (RSI, MACD) do not capture the same rate-of-change dynamics.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_19 requires three separate ROC period calculations (6, 12, 24) with simultaneous peak detection and coordinated decline tracking. This is a specialized technical indicator not present in the allowed indicator set. The signal is untranslatable without ROC support.
